title: Beille Set of 6 Clear Classic Goblet Water Glasses Home Decor Glassware, 7.43oz
description:
Featuring a simple, classic and timeless design, these goblet water glasses from Beille are elegant enough to sit next to wine glasses or other cocktail glasses for a formal table setting, yet durable and casual enough to endure everyday use, whether for orange juice at breakfast or a refreshing glass of your favorite sparkling water on a hot summer afternoon. Not too big and not too small, these perfectly sized water glasses or goblet glasses hold 7.43 fluid ounces or 20ML. Whether for wine, juice, lemonade, iced tea, water and more, these water glasses can do it all with style. Exuding a casual, yet classic and stylish design, these stemmed or footed water glasses are well balanced, feature a rolled rim and are made from durable and quality glass materials

Beille Set of 6 Clear Classic Goblet Water Glasses Home Decor Glassware, 7.43oz

Featuring a simple, classic and timeless design, these goblet water glasses from Beille are elegant enough to sit next to wine glasses or other cocktail glasses for a formal table setting, yet durable and casual enough to endure everyday use, whether for orange juice at breakfast or a refreshing glass of your favorite sparkling water on a hot summer afternoon.

Not too big and not too small, these perfectly sized water glasses or goblet glasses hold 7.43 fluid ounces or 20ML. Whether for wine, juice, lemonade, iced tea, water and more, these water glasses can do it all with style.

Key Features

  • CLASSIC WATER GLASSES: Featuring a simple and timeless design, these goblet water glasses from Beille are elegant enough to complement wine or other cocktail glasses for a more formal table setting, but absolutely durable enough for everyday use
  • PERFECTLY SIZED: Not too big, not too small, these perfectly sized water glasses hold 7.43oz; whether for wine, orange juice, lemonade, iced tea, water and more, these water glasses can do it all with style
  • DURABLE GOBLET GLASSES: Exuding a casual yet classic and stylish design, these footed goblet glasses are well balanced, feature a rolled rim and are made from durable and quality glass materials
  • DISHWASHER SAFE: Conveniently dishwasher safe, place water glasses or wine glasses on the top rack for an easy and quick kitchen clean up
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 6.25 x 3.25 x 3 inches; Individual Glass Weight: 0.54lbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: REPJ5S4K
  • UPC: 810131705657
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: Medium

Exuding a casual, yet classic and stylish design, these stemmed or footed water glasses are well balanced, feature a rolled rim and are made from durable and quality glass materials. And, they’re conveniently dishwasher safe; place water glasses or wine glasses on the top rack for easy and quick kitchen clean up.

These classic stemmed water glasses or wine glasses from Beille will make a stylish addition to any kitchen with their no fuss, timeless design and durable glass construction. You’ll reach for these water glasses for all sorts of different occasions, and perhaps even for a dessert recipe like chocolate mousse or a mini berry trifle. Enjoy! Water glasses sold as a set of six.

Individual Water Glass Dimensions: 6.25 x 3.25 x 3 inches

Individual Water Glass Weight: 0.54lbs

Sold as a set of 4, 6 or 10
